title: How a Microsoft product from June 1979 led to the IBM PC
content:
June 1979 is a significant month in history for Microsoft for two reasons. That month, they crossed the threshold of an installed base of 200,000 on its flagship 8080 Basic. And on June 18, 1979, Microsoft released a version of
